headline: PepsiCo (PEP) Stock Looks About Right Despite Its 18% Slide
summary: PepsiCo stock is coming off a weak three year stretch, with the share price down about 18%. However, the current valuation checks and recent headlines around an activist stake suggest the market may already be pricing in many of the concerns. Over the past three years, PepsiCo shares have declined about 18%, which keeps recent buyers under pressure and raises the bar for any case that the stock is attractively priced today. Elliott Investment Management's roughly US$4b activist stake can...

headline: Citi cuts PepsiCo rating as North America weakness shows no signs of abating
summary: Investing.com -- Citi downgraded PepsiCo to Neutral from Buy and cut its price target to $145 from $170 in a note on Friday, citing persistent weakness in the company’s North American business that strategic actions have so far failed to reverse.

content.title: Citi cuts PepsiCo rating as North America weakness shows no signs of abating
content.summary: Investing.com -- Citi downgraded PepsiCo to Neutral from Buy and cut its price target to $145 from $170 in a note on Friday, citing persistent weakness in the company’s North American business that strategic actions have so far failed to reverse.

headline: What Would It Take to Permanently Cover Long-Term Care Insurance Premiums?
summary: A long-term care policy does not just protect against a future care bill. It also creates a premium bill that may have to be paid for decades. A healthy 55-year-old buying meaningful inflation protection can face annual premiums in the low-to-mid thousands, and a 55-year-old couple can easily cross $5,000 combined. The planning question is: ... What Would It Take to Permanently Cover Long-Term Care Insurance Premiums?

content.title: What Would It Take to Permanently Cover Long-Term Care Insurance Premiums?
content.summary: A long-term care policy does not just protect against a future care bill. It also creates a premium bill that may have to be paid for decades. A healthy 55-year-old buying meaningful inflation protection can face annual premiums in the low-to-mid thousands, and a 55-year-old couple can easily cross $5,000 combined. The planning question is: ... What Would It Take to Permanently Cover Long-Term Care Insurance Premiums?

headline: PepsiCo (PEP) Stock Fair Value Edges Lower As Analysts Split On North America Execution
summary: PepsiCo’s fair value estimate has been trimmed from US$168.27 to US$164.86, a reduction of about 2.0% that reflects more cautious assumptions in the latest valuation work. This adjustment lines up with research in which bullish analysts are keeping positive ratings while reducing price targets, and more cautious voices are questioning near term execution, particularly in PepsiCo Foods North America. As you read on, you will see how this evolving analyst narrative might influence how you track...
